# The Intervention Network

> Trusted Interventionists. Zero Referral Fees. One Mission.

The Intervention Network is a curated, vetted national network of addiction interventionists. We connect families in crisis with trusted professionals — without referral fees or kickbacks.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://theinterventionistnetwork.com/
- Find an Interventionist: https://theinterventionistnetwork.com/find
- Join the Network: https://theinterventionistnetwork.com/join
- Get Help: https://theinterventionistnetwork.com/help
- About: https://theinterventionistnetwork.com/about
- Blog: https://theinterventionistnetwork.com/blog
- Contact: https://theinterventionistnetwork.com/contact

## About

Founded by Matt Brown, a 20+ year veteran interventionist with 22 years of personal recovery. The network exists to solve a simple problem: families in crisis can't find trusted interventionists, and great interventionists can't find the families who need them.

Our model: interventionists pay a membership fee. Families pay nothing to be matched. No referral fees change hands. Ever.

## Contact

Phone: (541) 838-6009
